backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a player management canister with CRUD operations for players (create, read, update score), using a Map for storage and including a blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features (React frontend with player list/add form, and industrial tycoon visual theme) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their roles in the Makeshift Moguls app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'Makeshift Moguls' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component rendering the header banner, stats bar (player count and top score), collapsible add-mogul form, and the player leaderboard with a branded footer.
frontend/src/components/AddPlayerForm.ts: Controlled form component for creating new mogul players, with inline validation, loading state, and gold-accented industrial styling.
frontend/src/components/PlayerList.tsx: Leaderboard component rendering players sorted by rank with rank badges, coin icons, score display, and hover-revealed ±10 score adjustment buttons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating player data (get all, get one, create, update score) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining a dark charcoal/gold tycoon theme via Tailwind CSS custom properties and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom gold/charcoal color tokens, display fonts, border radii, and box shadows matching the tycoon visual theme.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata, existing features, and pending feature requests for the Makeshift Moguls app, including backend and frontend build tasks.
